prompt: A stylized 3D cartoon figure of a character featuring large expressive eyes and a mildly sad, sulky expression, set against a flat pastel green backdrop. The character sports a plush white fuzzy beanie with ear flaps and coordinating white over-ear headphones. Short, slightly disheveled brown hair peeks out from under the hat. Dressed in a baggy light green tee with a bold black graphic on the chest, arms folded in a bored or irritated stance. Soft, diffused studio lighting creates smooth shadows for a polished look. Ultra-detailed, high-quality 3D render in a Pixar-inspired style, smooth textures, shallow depth of field, centered framing, clean minimal background, gentle yet vivid color scheme.
